ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Page ! 	of 24	2
PLF – launch resource toolbox
Launch Resource Overview
Here’s your Launch Resource Toolbox with almost 200 resources for the online entrepreneur.
What you’ll find here are mostly tools that I use, my team uses, or a few that my guru buddies (or
my platinum mastermind) use that I feel comfortable recommending, and I've heard good things
about. Some of the links are affiliate links; most are not. Throughout the course you’ll hear me
talk about several of these tools, why I like them, and even how to use many of them in the
Quickstart Tutorial videos.
There are a lot of resources listed in this toolbox, but keep in mind - this list is not
comprehensive. There are a lot of different tools. New stuff is coming out all the time.
And…you don't need all of these. In fact, just a few of them are probably "mission critical" ... like
a hosting account/website and an email/autoresponder service like ProFollow. So, this list
should get you pointed in the right direction but be sure to do your own research before jumping
in...
If you don't see something on this list it doesn't mean it doesn't work. It just
means that I don't have experience with it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

PLF – launch resource toolbox
Launch Resource Essentials
Here are the top recommended resources in each area for getting started quickly.
Setting up a website & building your list
• 	Website: Wordpress
• 	Opt-in Form: LeadPages
• 	Collect Emails: Aweber
Create your lead magnet and product
• 	Email series (autoresponder): Aweber
• 	Membership site: Kajabi
• 	Digital documents: Adobe PDF Creator
• 	Video lessons: Vimeo or Wistia
• 	Mailed physical products (CDs, etc.): Disk.com
Launch Your product
• 	Pre-Prelaunch survey: Surveymonkey.com
• 	Autoresponders: Aweber
• 	Squeeze pages: LeadPages
• 	Video sales letter: Logitec Camera w/built in mic and Camtasia for editing
• 	Shopping cart: 1shoppingcart
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Autoresponders

Blogging Platforms
• 	Wordpress.com – free hosted option
• 	Wordpress.org - Another free blog program, this is my current favorite for any new blogs I
am setting up
• 	Rainmaker – blog platf0rm by the makers of Copyblogger with integrated forum,
membership site, analytics, and affiliate software
• 	Blogger – free blogging tool that’s easy to set up
• 	Moveable Type - Not free anymore, but this is popular blog software if your site needs a
serious blog. In other words, if your business model is really built around your blog, you
might consider this one

Split Testing, Analytics & Tracking
• 	Google Analytics - Excellent free analytics program that is very robust
• 	Get Clicky - It’s stats tracking like Google Analytics, but it’s real time. So you don’t have to
wait until the end of the day to see stats. A real advantage during a launch!
• 	Google Content Experiments (replaced Google Website Optimizer)
• 	Google URL Builder
• 	Google Webmaster Tools
• 	Website Analytics Terminology
• 	Visual Website Optimizer
Squeeze Pages
• 	LeadPages - I absolutely love Leadpages. This is how we create pretty much all the pages
for our business right now. It's great for squeeze pages, sales pages, webinar pages,
webcast pages, thank you pages, etc.
• 	OptimizePress
